name: Microsoft 365
author: Axon Team
description: OAuth2 sign-in with Microsoft 365 / Azure AD (multi-tenant). Registers an AUTH_PROVIDER using the platform's existing OAuth2 mechanics. Ships with no credentials; requires client_id/client_secret/redirect_uri from an Azure AD app registration.

client_id.description: Application (client) ID from the Azure AD app registration

client_secret.description: Client secret value from the Azure AD app registration

redirect_uri.description: Registered redirect URI for the OAuth consent screen

scopes.description: Override default scopes (openid, email, profile, offline_access, User.Read)
